goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and k0 + k0 < eps }
exists(k0: Real) { closure(s).contains(k0) and k0.is_close(x, eps2) }
proof: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real, x2: Real) { not is_eps_adherent_to_set(x0, x1, x2) or exists(k0: Real) { k0 ∈ x0 and k0.is_close(x1, x2) } }(closure(s), x, eps2)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { s.contains(k0) and k0.is_close(y, eps2) }
proof: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real, x2: Real) { not is_eps_adherent_to_set(x0, x1, x2) or exists(k0: Real) { k0 ∈ x0 and k0.is_close(x1, x2) } }(s, y, eps2)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real, x4: Real) { not x0.is_close(x1, x2) or not x3.is_close(x1, x4) or x0.is_close(x3, x2 + x4) }(z, y, eps2, x, eps2)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not x0.is_close(x1, x2) or x1.is_close(x0, x2) }(y, x, eps2)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and not is_eps_adherent_to_set(s, x, w0) }
function(x0: Real) { not is_adherent_point_of_set(closure(s), x) or not x0.is_positive or is_eps_adherent_to_set(s, x, x0) }(w0)
function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { not is_adherent_point_of_set(closure(x0), x1) or is_adherent_point_of_set(x0, x1) }(s, x)
function(x0: Set[Real]) { forall(x1: Real) { not is_adherent_point_of_set(x0, x1) or x1 ∈ x0 } = is_closed_set(x0) }(closure(s))
let w0: Real satisfy { is_adherent_point_of_set(closure(s), w0) and not w0 ∈ closure(s) }
function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { not is_adherent_point_of_set(closure(x0), x1) or x1 ∈ closure(x0) }(s, w0)
